$schema: Static rubric. Scores live in assessment.json. History lives in assessment-history.json.

dimensions.title: Automation — Hooks, Commands, Agents
nextActions: Add a PostToolUse hook that runs your formatter on Write|Edit — Boris tip 7
Create ~/.claude/commands/ship.md that chains test → simplify → commit → PR — Boris tip 5
Build one personal ~/.claude/agents/verify-app.md tuned to how you verify features end-to-end — Boris tip 14/73
Wire a Stop hook that pokes Claude to re-verify before yielding on long-running tasks — Boris tip 13

dimensions.title: Permissions & Safety
nextActions: Turn off skipDangerousModePermissionPrompt, turn on auto mode (shift+tab or --enable-auto-mode) — Boris tip 42
Run /fewer-permission-prompts once this week to tune a real allowlist — Boris tip 69
Add wildcard allowlist entries (e.g. 'Bash(npm run *)', 'Bash(gh pr *)') to settings.json — Boris tip 20

dimensions.title: Model & Effort Tuning
nextActions: Change effortLevel to 'xhigh' in settings.json — Boris tip 67, 72
Learn the /effort max reflex for debugging and architecture sessions — Boris tip 34
Export CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW=400000 in shell rc — Boris tip 64

dimensions.title: Parallel Execution & Subagents
nextActions: Set up 3 named worktree shell aliases (za/zb/zc) for your most active repo — Boris tip 1
Next migration or sweep: phrase it as 'use /batch with worktree isolation, put up PRs'
Add isolation: worktree to any custom agent you build — Boris tip 28

dimensions.title: Verification — The #1 Tip
nextActions: Install the Claude Chrome extension for any web work — Boris tip 51
Adopt 'Claude do X, then /go' as your default closing prompt — Boris tip 73
Ask Claude to diff behavior between main and the feature branch after any non-trivial change — Boris tip 10

dimensions.title: Memory & Context Management
nextActions: Run /memory and enable auto-dream — Boris tip 45
Get into the /rewind reflex when Claude goes sideways — keeps failed attempts out of context — Boris tip 62
Write a CLAUDE.md for claude-extensions the first time you hit a correction worth remembering — Boris tip 4

dimensions.title: Planning & Delegation
nextActions: Adopt a template: Goal / Constraints / Acceptance Criteria at the top of every non-trivial prompt — Boris tip 66
After plan mode, resist the urge to narrate step by step — launch and come back — Boris tip 65

dimensions.title: Integrations — MCP, Plugins, Marketplaces
nextActions: npm i -g vercel to unlock env/deploy/logs agentic flows
If your team uses Slack, add the Slack MCP — highest-value MCP per Boris — Boris tip 9

dimensions.title: Terminal & Customization
nextActions: Set per-worktree /color so parallel sessions are distinguishable at a glance — Boris tip 40
Try /focus for autonomous runs once auto mode is on — Boris tip 71
Customize a handful of spinner verbs — Boris tip 25

dimensions.title: Scheduled & Autonomous Workflows
nextActions: Start with one loop: /loop 30m /babysit — Boris tip 48
Set up a Stop-hook system notification for autonomous runs — Boris tip 75
Promote repeating patterns to a Routine (cloud-hosted, laptop-closed) — Boris tip 61

dimensions.title: Remote & Mobile
nextActions: Enable 'Remote Control for all sessions' in /config — Boris tip 47
Try kicking off one task from iOS this week — Boris tip 46

dimensions.title: Learning & Explanatory Mode
nextActions: Optional: build a spaced-repetition skill for parts of the codebase you want to retain — Boris tip 15
